narrative:
Ross County has 44,807 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a clear Republican lean of 7.2 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.0% of registrants.
